lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: You're not aristocracy but I suppose you'd do. Do you want a good cook for 3000 coins?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I am the finest cook in all Gielinor! I can also make good time going to the bank or the sawmill.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your previous jobs.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I used to be the cook for the old Duke of Lumbridge. Visiting dignitaries praised me for my fine banquets!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: But then someone found a rule that said that only one family could hold that post.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Overnight I was fired and replaced by some fool who can't even bake a cake without help!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Hmph! I don't work for just anyone, you know! I refuse to work for someone who's below level 30 Construction!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're hired... well, I don't have the money on me, but can I owe you? I'm good for it, honest.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Are you having a laugh? No cash up front, no cook.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: [Alright, sir./Alright, madam./Alright.] I can start work immediately.
